title: ジャパンカップの後に・執事なき激戦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Oguri Cap's invitation, Tamamo Cross enters
the Japan Cup—the second of the three big G1
races this season—and emerges victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, with her body buckling under the stress,
it was definitely a narrow victory. Hoping her
condition will improve, we head for the Arima
Kinen.
